prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名约第59名，近年排名稳定在50-59区间；2026年声誉评价为中性/混合，主要涉及宿舍安检等校园管理事件，无重大负面舆情；抖音热度排名第41位（较热），短视频曝光量处于中上水平，反映报考关注度尚可；新闻传播学A、工商管理A、应用经济学A-、中国语言文学A-、生物学A-、药学A-等6个A-及以上学科，综合类院校学科覆盖面广。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程等理工科专业持续高热推荐；河南省2026年普通高考考生总数约120万人（含不确定），较2025年历史类+物理类合计约90.7万人明显增加，竞争加剧，2025年物理类本科批427分；暨南大学位于广东广州，属一线城市高校，对河南考生有较强地域吸引力；该校在河南招生占比逐年提升，2025年河南招生98人（占全国16.4%），属省外重点生源省份。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2026年大幅扩招（+24.7%）缓解竞争压力、河南省考生总数明显增加加剧竞争、学校声誉稳定且抖音热度较热、理工科专业持续高热等因素，扩招效应与考生增加效应相互对冲；在供需弹性计算基础上，考虑考生规模增长带来的竞争加剧，预测最低位次约32044名，区间31544-32544名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for science/physics category was approximately 24547 → 15216 → 18105 → 33383 → 28088, with significant fluctuations; in 2024, it dropped sharply to 33383 before rebounding to 28088 in 2025, with a cumulative backward shift of about 3500 positions over the past two years; the baseline for 2025 is approximately 28088; the provincial science/physics category enrollment plan was 53 in 2021 → 54 in 2022 → 58 in 2023 → 62 in 2024 → 73 in 2025 → 91 in 2026, with continuous expansion and a 24.7% increase in 2026, easing competitive pressure.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class university; ranked approximately 59th in the Soft Science Chinese University Rankings, with stable rankings in the 50-59 range in recent years; the reputation evaluation for 2026 is neutral/mixed, mainly involving campus management incidents such as dormitory security checks, with no major negative public opinion; Douyin popularity ranks 41st (relatively hot), with short video exposure at an upper-middle level, reflecting moderate application attention; it has 6 A- or above disciplines including Journalism and Communication A, Business Administration A, Applied Economics A-, Chinese Language and Literature A-, Biology A-, and Pharmacy A-, with a broad disciplinary coverage as a comprehensive university.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: STEM majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering continue to be highly recommended; the total number of candidates for the 2026 Henan Province general college entrance examination is approximately 1.2 million (including uncertainties), a significant increase from the combined total of about 907,000 for history and physics categories in 2025, intensifying competition; the 2025 physics category undergraduate batch cutoff is 427 points; Jinan University is located in Guangzhou, Guangdong, a first-tier city university, which has strong regional appeal to Henan candidates; the university's enrollment proportion in Henan has been increasing year by year, with 98 students enrolled in Henan in 2025 (accounting for 16.4% of the national total), making it a key source province outside the province.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering factors such as the significant enrollment expansion in 2026 (+24.7%) easing competitive pressure, the notable increase in the total number of candidates in Henan Province intensifying competition, the stable reputation of the university with relatively high Douyin popularity, and the sustained high popularity of STEM majors, the expansion effect and the candidate increase effect offset each other; based on supply-demand elasticity calculations and considering the intensified competition due to the growth in candidate numbers, the predicted minimum ranking is approximately 32044, with a range of 31544 to 32544.

预测结论.text: Considering the significant expansion in 2026 (+55.6%) which greatly eases competition, the increase in Henan history category candidates by about 33% which intensifies competition, stable university reputation, and divergence in liberal arts major popularity, the expansion effect far outweighs the candidate increase effect; based on supply-demand elasticity calculations, and considering the intensified competition from candidate scale growth, the predicted minimum ranking is approximately 4010, with a range of 3510-4510.
